heading: Memorials and other acknowledgments for contributions to health of Nation
label: 238i Memorials and other acknowledgments for contributions to health of Nation
text: The Secretary may provide for suitably acknowledging, within the Department (whether by memorials, designations, or other suitable acknowledgments), (1) efforts of persons who have contributed substantially to the health of the Nation and (2) gifts for use in activities of the Department related to health.
